tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $108.10 May 1 (-2.1%, TradingEconomics; hit wartime high $126 Apr 30 CNBC before Trump 'not satisfied' with Iran proposal). Trump declared hostilities 'terminated' (legal bypass only; blockade intact). Mine-clearing ~6 months (PBS) - Hormuz physical reopening delayed even on deal. Nuclear stalemate persists; Tail (45%) + Stress (45%) = 90% continued disruption. Stop-loss: confirmed deal + mine clearance + P&I restoration (Brent sub-$92). Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $108.10 May 1 (-2.1%, TradingEconomics); ASEAN Energy Equities ~143.0 est. (-2.7%); ASEAN Banks ~174.5 est. (+0.6%). iTraxx Asia IG ~195bp (-5bp est.); ASEAN HY ~582bp (-6bp est.). Trump declared hostilities 'terminated' (legal bypass; blockade intact); Iran phased proposal rejected on nuclear. ASEAN Energy long supported at $108 Brent stress floor; ASEAN Banks underweight easing. Tail (45%) points to $130+ Brent and 230-260bp iTraxx. Conviction medium on both legs.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~58.60 est. (-0.17% May 2). Trump 'terminated' declaration mild EM FX positive; blockade intact; Iran phased proposal rejected - nuclear stalemate; tail risk 45% unchanged. Full PHP recovery still capped - Hormuz reopening requires mine clearance ~6 months. USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 overlay retains tail hedge value. Stop-loss: confirmed full Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration below 58.00. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Hold on Re-Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~17,090 est. (-0.29% May 2); Indonesia 10Y ~7.30% est. (-5bp). Brent $108.10 May 1 - ICP overshoot ~$38/bbl, severe fiscal pressure persists. Trump 'terminated' declaration mild EM relief; blockade intact; nuclear stalemate; tail risk 45%. Hold IDR short at half-size; fiscal strain keeps risk elevated. Stop-loss at USD/IDR 16,600 (confirmed Hormuz reopening). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Hold at 210bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~195bp (-5bp May 2 est.); ASEAN HY ~582bp (-6bp est.). Trump 'terminated' declaration provides modest spread relief; Iran phased proposal rejected - nuclear stalemate; tail risk 45%. Mine-clearing ~6 months even post-deal (PBS); full Hormuz commercial reopening delayed. Hold CDS protection at trimmed size; tail (45%) targets iTraxx 230-260bp; stress (45%) stabilises 195-215bp. Remove at confirmed deal + mine clearance + spreads below 175bp. Conviction medium.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM confirmed $16.48 Apr 28 (-0.45%, TradingEconomics); TTF €46.15 May 1 (+0.35%, TradingEconomics). Trump 'terminated' declaration is legal bypass only - Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026; mine-clearing ~6 months regardless of deal (PBS); Iran phased proposal rejected. Hold JKM long; nuclear stalemate maintains structural premium. Stress target $18-22 JKM; tail target $26-30. Stop at confirmed mine clearance + P&I restoration. Conviction medium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary
